goal_text:
You are traveling to Cambridge and looking forward to try local restaurants.
You are looking for a place to stay. The hotel should be in the 'north' and 'doesn't need to include internet'.
The hotel 'doesn't need to have free parking'.
Once you find the 'hotel' you want to book it for '3 people' and '4 nights' starting from 'wednesday'.
Make sure you get the 'reference number'.
You are also looking for a place to dine. The restaurant should serve 'indian' food and should be 'in the same area as the hotel'.
Once you find the 'restaurant' you want to book a table for 'the same group of people' at '15:15' on 'the same day'.
If the booking fails how about 'thursday'.
Make sure you get the 'reference number'.
You also want to book a 'taxi' to commute between the two places.
You want to make sure it arrives the restaurant 'by the booked time'.
Make sure you get 'contact number' and 'car type'.

book.destination: restaurant that the user will book
book.departure: accommodation that the user will book

message: You are traveling to Cambridge and looking forward to try local restaurants
You are looking for a place to stay. The hotel should be in the north and doesn't need to include internet
The hotel doesn't need to have free parking
Once you find the hotel you want to book it for 3 people and 4 nights starting from wednesday
Make sure you get the reference number
You are also looking for a place to dine. The restaurant should serve indian food and should be in the same area as the hotel
Once you find the restaurant you want to book a table for the same group of people at 15:15 on the same day
If the booking fails how about thursday
Make sure you get the reference number
You also want to book a taxi to commute between the two places
You want to make sure it arrives the restaurant by the booked time
Make sure you get contact number and car type
